summary.zh: 修复 Windows 版本的发布校验，并让 AtomGit 镜像能自动同步 GitHub 的最新版与预发布状态，避免旧预发布积压阻塞后续更新。
summary.en: Fix Windows release verification and keep the AtomGit mirror synchronized with GitHub latest and prerelease status, so accumulated prereleases no longer block future updates.

title.zh: Windows 版本发布校验恢复可靠

summary.zh: Windows 受限执行环境可正常启动，发布流程会在上传前验证它，减少 Windows 版本构建失败或漏检的情况。
summary.en: The restricted Windows runtime can start correctly, and the release pipeline verifies it before upload to catch Windows build failures earlier.

sources.title: fix(release): restore AtomGit mirroring and Windows sandbox launch

title.zh: AtomGit 镜像持续同步更新状态
title.en: AtomGit mirror keeps release status in sync

summary.zh: 镜像会自动同步 GitHub 的 Latest 与预发布状态；新版本完成校验后会清理旧镜像记录，避免预发布数量上限阻塞后续更新。
summary.en: The mirror automatically follows GitHub Latest and prerelease status; after a new version is verified, it removes older mirror records so the prerelease cap cannot block later updates.

sources.title: fix(release): restore AtomGit mirroring and Windows sandbox launch
